# DOW-UAP-D14, Mission Report, Iraq, May 2022 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY~~

# Misrep undefined-7561279

## Narrative

(S//REL) AT 1355Z, [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM SIGONELLA AIRBASE (LICZ).

AT 1424Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE.

FROM 1507Z TO 0906Z, [1.4a] COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER.

AT 1551Z, [1.4a] WAS ON STATION IN SRO TRACK (41EMD).

FROM 1938Z TO 0230Z, [1.4a] CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IVO 41EMD IVO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1.

AT 2147Z, [1.4a] WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING 1X POSS RFAF SU-30. SEE REACTION LINE 1.

AT 0117Z, ONE POSSIBLE SMALL UAP WAS OBSERVED. SEE UAP LINE 1.

AT 0011Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED ONE PROBABLE SU-27/35 LANDING IVO AL ASSAD AFLD. SEE OBS LINE 1.

AT 0230Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB.

AT 0616Z, [1.4a] WAS OFF STATION.

AT 0934Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE.

AT 1025Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT LRCT. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-IN AND DGS4

~~(S//RELIDO) Mission Narrative~~

## Admin

## CLASSIFICATION

| 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b)(6) |
| :--- |

~~SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY~~

MDR 25-0094 thru MDR 25-0099 / JS-250710-TM8S                                                                                              10/17/25 001
Approved for Release to AARO

# DOW-UAP-D14, Mission Report, Iraq, May 2022 - Page 8

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY~~

### GENTEXT/REACTION

* Gentext: (S/NF) AT 2147Z, [1.4a] WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING 1X POSS RFAF SU-30, THAT GOT APPROXIMATELY 5NM FROM [1.4a] THE ACFT APPROACHED WESTWARD FROM THE SYRIAN COAST, FLEW DIRECTLY UNDER [1.4a] ORBIT (FL190, VS [1.4a] FL243) FOR APPROXIMATELY 2 MIN, FLEW SOUTH FOR ABOUT 10NM, AND THEN RETURNED WEST. THERE WAS NO IMPACT TO THE MISSION. [1.4a] THEN CONTINUED MISSION AS PLANNED. [1.4a] DID NOT VISUALLY ACQUIRE THE REPORTED ACFT.

### WEATHER

* Weather: (U) WEATHER WAS NOT A FACTOR.

### UAP

* Initial Contact DTG: 300117:00ZMAY22
* MDS Type / Asset Type: [1.4a, 1.4g]
* Tail Number: [1.4a, 1.4g]

* UAP Altitude, Depth, Velocity, and Trajectory (indicate estimated or measured): -

### GENTEXT/UAP

* UAP Description (e.g., size, shape, color, markings, recognizable features): (S/REL) [1.4a] [1.4a] OBSERVED A UAP AT 0117Z FLY NORTH TO NORTH EAST AND FOLLOWED AS LONG AS POSSIBLE. [1.4a] SCREENER COULD NOT GET A POSITIVE ID ON THE UAP.

### OBSERVATION
